team_name: TenderTrust AI: Multimodal Automated Compliance Engine with Explainable Audit Trails for CRPF Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform to automate government tender evaluations, using Multimodal LLMs, OCR, and a custom rule matching engine. The platform will provide explainable evaluation reports and ensure data security.
key_steps: Bulk uploading of tender documents and bidder response files
Document processing using Google Vision API and Tesseract OCR
AI & Information Extraction using GPT-4 (OpenAI) and spaCy
Evaluation using a custom rule matching engine
Explainability & Audit with an explanation generator
optimization_claims: Cuts the evaluation cycle from weeks to minutes
Removes human error in checking complex financial and technical thresholds
Offers a tamper-proof audit trail for every procurement decision made by the CRPF
constraints_addressed: Data Security with Firebase Authentication and role-based access
